title: Wall Coatings - Elite South Texas
content:
Wall coatings are engineered to be applied in thicker, non-sagging applications to protect vertical surfaces from chemical exposure and abrasion while being easy to clean and maintain. These coatings can be applied to block walls, concrete, cement board and sheetrock.
Commercial Restrooms
Chemical Plants
Food Manufacturing and Processing Plants
Pharmaceutical Facilities & Clean Rooms
Educational Facilities
Jails & Prisons
Greenhouses & Indoor Agriculture
Cannabis Grow Facilities
Contact an Elite South Texas technical representative for more details.
